features.title: Phase 0: build the factory
features.description: Implement the full control plane from the blueprint: state files, sub-agents, skills, rules, hooks, gate scripts, update-state writer, CI workflows.
acceptance: Every file in the AI_OPERATIONS_PLAN.md section 3 layout exists with working content
bash scripts/verify.sh exits 0 (typecheck + state validation + shield)
update-state.ts is the only writer of features.json and refuses passes:true without evidence files on disk
Hooks are wired in .claude/settings.json and scripts exist and are executable
CI workflow runs verify.sh + assertion-shield + state validation on every PR

features.title: Demo feature through the full loop
features.description: Run one deliberately trivial feature (e.g. a health-check page or CLI ping) through brief, build, verify, evaluate, PR, CI, and merge to prove the loop works end to end.
acceptance: Feature implemented by the builder sub-agent from a written brief
Evidence saved under roadmap/evidence/F-0002/ including a green verify log
Evaluator sub-agent issued PASS from a fresh context
PR merged to develop with green CI and the operator PR template

features.title: Contract tests for hooks and gate scripts
features.description: Fixture-based tests for guard-bash.sh, verify-gate.sh, commit-on-stop.sh, session-brief.sh, update-state.ts and assertion-shield.ts so the safety net is tested code.
acceptance: Each hook has at least one test proving it blocks what it must block and allows what it must allow
update-state.ts tests cover: schema rejection, evidence-file requirement, dependency validation
Tests run inside scripts/verify.sh and in CI

features.title: Operator one-time setup completed
features.description: Human-only checklist: GitHub App install, branch protection, ANTHROPIC_API_KEY secret, cloud environment, Routines. Agents cannot do these; tracked here so status reports surface it.
acceptance: Branch protection active on develop (PR + green CI) and stable branch (PR + human approval)
claude-code-action secret configured and @claude responds on a test PR
Cloud environment created with init.sh as setup script
features.blocked_reason: Requires human operator actions (GitHub settings, secrets, claude.ai configuration) — see QUESTIONS.md

features.title: Philosophy in README + downtime/self-improvement protocol
features.description: Operator-stated philosophy (six principles incl. servant leadership and axe-sharpening) added to README; orchestrator downtime protocol (proactive research, sentinel monitoring, pre-briefing, kaizen) added to the plan and wired into skills.
acceptance: README Philosophy section covers all six operator considerations including both leadership maxims
AI_OPERATIONS_PLAN.md gains P6 and a Downtime & Idle Protocol section consistent with token-efficiency rules
/work and a new /downtime skill implement the protocol; CLAUDE.md references it and stays under 150 lines
bash scripts/verify.sh exits 0

features.title: Review remediation: harden gates, fix inert security patterns, correct platform docs
features.description: Fix the nine verified defects from the external review: assertion-shield staged/deleted-file blind spots, CI evidence audit in --validate, done-implies-passes + cycle invariants, security-patterns plugin schema, guard-bash refspec/flag bypasses, promotion-PR identity docs, dependabot.yml + formal deferrals, verify.sh product-mode gates, zero-CLI operator recovery.
acceptance: assertion-shield catches staged assertion deletions and wholesale test-file deletions (contract-tested)
update-state --validate runs checkEvidence on every passes:true feature and rejects done-without-passes and dependency cycles (contract-tested)
security-patterns.json matches the documented plugin schema (rule_name/reminder/regex|substrings)
guard-bash blocks refspec pushes to stable branches and flag-separated git push variants (contract-tested)
dependabot.yml ships; format hook and path-guard formally deferred in plan 6.3; plan security citations corrected (GHSA-8q5r-mmjf-575q, Claude Code 2.1.128, StopFailure, YAML/JSON wording)
verify.sh hard-fails missing test script in product mode; verify-rules.ts no longer emits false-positive warnings
OPERATOR_GUIDE recovery is zero-CLI
bash scripts/verify.sh exits 0

features.title: Per-feature authorized_paths edit guard (PreToolUse)
features.description: Mechanically enforce the active feature's authorized_paths/forbidden_paths on Edit/Write via a PreToolUse hook. Design must resolve: which feature is active when several are in_progress (likely a CLAUDE_ACTIVE_FEATURE env contract set in builder briefs), glob matching engine, and fail-open vs fail-closed when no feature is active.
acceptance: Hook blocks edits outside the active feature's authorized_paths and inside forbidden_paths
Orchestrator/maintenance sessions without an active feature are not broken
Contract tests cover block, allow, and no-active-feature cases

features.title: Guardrail static analysis + engine lint
features.description: Verified feedback items B-11/B-12: shellcheck + actionlint over hooks/scripts/workflows as engine meta-gates (hard in CI, command -v soft-skip locally); Biome lint for the engine TypeScript, removing the template-mode lint skip for engine code. Format hook follows as sequenced step 2.
acceptance: verify.sh runs shellcheck over .claude/hooks/*.sh and scripts/*.sh and actionlint over .github/workflows, hard-failing in CI and soft-skipping when binaries are absent locally
Biome wired as devDependency with minimal config; engine TS lints clean; the (no lint script) skip message is gone for engine code
CI green; contract tests still 63+ passing

features.title: Deterministic security tripwires
features.description: Verified feedback items #46/#50/#20-part/#48-reshape: exfil-shaped POST patterns in guard-bash + security-patterns (secret-shaped strings or non-allowlisted hosts in curl/gh POST shapes, not all POSTs); CI tripwire failing PRs that add trust-widening workflow keys or .mcp.json changes; assertion-shield detection of .skip/.only/xit/xdescribe added lines; model-policy last_verified staleness warning in update-state --validate.
acceptance: guard-bash blocks exfil-shaped POSTs and allows the downtime sentinel gh api reads (contract-tested both ways)
CI fails a PR adding allowed_non_write_users-class keys or workflow .mcp.json changes
assertion-shield flags added .skip/.only lines in test files (contract-tested)
--validate warns when model-policy last_verified exceeds 30 days

features.title: Session metrics as data (metrics.jsonl)
features.description: Verified feedback item #26 + the useful half of #28: one JSONL record per /work session appended at RECORD (date, feature, attempts, evaluator/security verdicts, findings count, optional cost note); /kaizen reads it for its check-the-metric step; /status auto-fills the cost/health line; first-vs-second-attempt pass rate derivable from the two-strike data.
acceptance: roadmap/metrics.jsonl append shape defined and written by the /work RECORD step
kaizen and status SKILL.md updated to consume it
Schema documented; a malformed record fails validation in verify.sh

features.title: Docs and convention pack (verified wave 1)
features.description: Verified feedback items #1/#41/#61-adapted/#30-part/#32-line/#63-reshape/#53-gated: PR template (core operator sections only); dangerous-naming convention line; AGENTS.md 3-5 line pointer stub (Claude Code keeps CLAUDE.md per official docs); roadmap/briefs/TEMPLATE.md; one injection-size-bound sentence in plan section 9; 5-line constitution-edit checklist in CLAUDE.md section 9; PRODUCT_MODE-gated placeholder check in verify.sh.
acceptance: .github/pull_request_template.md matches plan section 8.3 operator template
AGENTS.md stub exists and points to CLAUDE.md; no divergence-check machinery
briefs/TEMPLATE.md exists with the immutable-brief shape from /work step 2
verify.sh fails on remaining <PLACEHOLDER> tokens only when PRODUCT_MODE is true
CLAUDE.md stays under 150 lines

features.title: seed.ts delegating shim - E2E gate must not pass unseeded in product mode
features.description: Adoption trial #1 (agy-software-2) surfaced an engine defect: verify.sh --e2e hard-codes scripts/seed.ts, and the template stub exits 0 unconditionally after the prod guard, so the E2E gate can go green against an unseeded database in every adopter repo. Rewrite the stub as a delegating shim: keep the prod-refusal guard; delegate to the package.json seed script when one is defined, propagating its exit status; hard-fail in product mode (src/ exists) when no seed script is defined; keep exit-0 stub behavior in template mode. Proven fix verified green in the adopter; adapt to template idiom.
acceptance: seed.ts keeps the prod-refusal guard: exits 1 when DATABASE_URL matches /prod/i, before any delegation
When package.json defines a seed script, seed.ts runs npm run --silent seed and exits with the child exit status (success and failure both propagate)
Product mode (src/ exists) with no seed script defined exits 1 with a clear message - the E2E gate cannot pass unseeded
Template mode (no src/, no seed script) logs the stub message and exits 0
Circular delegation (a seed script that re-invokes scripts/seed.ts) fails fast with a clear error instead of looping
Contract tests in scripts/test-hooks.sh cover the five behaviors above; bash scripts/verify.sh exits 0

features.title: Adopter-clean install path - scripts/install-into.sh + drop-in docs
features.description: Installs #1 (agy-software-2, fixed in its commit af92153) and #2 (BayLine) both had to hand-strip template self-proving artifacts from package.json: the test script points at src/health.test.js (adopters do not copy src/, so verify fails out of the box; copying src/ instead would flip product mode prematurely) and lint includes the not-yet-existing src path (Biome internal-error noise). Ship an adopter-clean install path: scripts/install-into.sh copies the documented drop-in set EXCLUDING roadmap state and self-test artifacts, transforms/merges package.json (no test script, lint scripts-only, placeholder-or-preserved name), seeds fresh roadmap state, and prints the remaining manual steps. Contract: a fresh adopter passes verify immediately after the documented procedure with zero hand-fixes. Also names the record-PR pattern (state flips ride the feature PR; post-merge records land via chore/ branch PRs because develop blocks direct pushes) in README + plan section 6.4.
acceptance: bash scripts/install-into.sh <target> installs the documented drop-in set into the target and EXCLUDES template self-state and self-test artifacts: no src/, no template package.json/package-lock.json, no roadmap state content (backlog entries, progress/decisions/questions/status history, metrics records, evidence files, F-*.md briefs), no docs/feedback-* files

The target package.json ends with NO test script and lint exactly biome lint scripts when the target had no lint of its own; an existing target package.json is merged, never clobbered (its name and scripts kept, engine scripts and devDependencies added); a created package.json gets an obvious placeholder name that is not ai-operations-template

The installed roadmap/ is freshly seeded (empty backlog valid against features.schema.json, fresh PROGRESS/DECISIONS/QUESTIONS/ROADMAP headers, empty metrics.jsonl, evidence dir) and re-running the installer never overwrites existing roadmap state in the target (idempotent upgrade path)

The script finishes by printing the remaining manual steps (placeholders, package name, init.sh + verify.sh, default branch + protection, /groom backlog seeding) and prints a loud warning when the target already has src/ (product mode demands the adopter-defined test and lint gates)

README drop-in step 1 documents scripts/install-into.sh as the supported path with the manual copy list kept as fallback; README step 4 area and AI_OPERATIONS_PLAN section 6.4 name the record-PR pattern (state flips ride the feature PR; post-merge records land via chore/ branch PRs since develop blocks direct pushes)

Contract tests in scripts/test-hooks.sh cover: exclusions, package.json transform (fresh and merge cases), fresh-state seeding, idempotent re-run, product-mode warning; evidence includes a real end-to-end install into a scratch repo with bash scripts/verify.sh green INSIDE the target; bash scripts/verify.sh exits 0 in the template repo
